'''rarubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecutiency|cecutiency]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-r-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecutiency|cecutiency]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rarubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræribith|ræribith]] || [[word:ræribij|ræribij]] || [[word:ræribish|ræribish]] || [[word:ræribi|ræribi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rarurubuth|rarurubuth]] || [[word:rarurubuj|rarurubuj]] || [[word:rarurubush|rarurubush]] || [[word:rarurubu|rarurubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rarubuth|rarubuth]] || [[word:rarubuj|rarubuj]] || [[word:rarubush|rarubush]] || [[word:rarubu|rarubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rarufbuth|rarufbuth]] || [[word:rarufbuj|rarufbuj]] || [[word:rarufbush|rarufbush]] || [[word:rarufbuf|rarufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rarubuthu|rarubuthu]] || [[word:rarubuju|rarubuju]] || [[word:rarubushu|rarubushu]] || [[word:rarubuku|rarubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rarubuth|rarubuth]] || [[word:rarubuj|rarubuj]] || [[word:rarubush|rarubush]] || [[word:rarubu|rarubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rarubuthul|rarubuthul]] || [[word:rarubujul|rarubujul]] || [[word:rarubushul|rarubushul]] || [[word:rarubukul|rarubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rarubuthuthu|rarubuthuthu]] || [[word:rarubujuju|rarubujuju]] || [[word:rarubushushu|rarubushushu]] || [[word:rarubuku|rarubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rarubuthun|rarubuthun]] || [[word:rarubujun|rarubujun]] || [[word:rarubushun|rarubushun]] || [[word:rarubukun|rarubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rarubuthuoro|rarubuthuoro]] || [[word:rarubujuoro|rarubujuoro]] || [[word:rarubushuoro|rarubushuoro]] || [[word:rarubukuoro|rarubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
